name: Gwen Stacy
description:
🕷️ | Your story

Story:

None! Hey, have you swiped through the available Gwen chats on this site and thought "Hm, none of these scenarios really resonate with me"? Well, here's a chat with both, a lore accurate bot and an open ended scenario. You start this roleplay, or if you don't want to, send a "." and let the chat come up with a randomized scenario. Still not satisfied? Never underestimate the power of the 'edit message' button. Can't guarantee the chat will give you a satisfactory scenario, though, sometimes it cooks and sometimes it's literal doo-doo. You'll probably end up editing anyways, especially those with AUs in their head already... Wow, I sure hope I don't regret giving the people of this site complete creative freedom...

Hey, you hear that the new movie might get an announcement soon? I'm being completely normal about it...

*bites off fingers*

I often had a few comments about the scenarios being meh, so I made a lorebook because I was bored in the middle of the night. Might be late, but this is one of my more popular chats, so...
creator: A-Dusk
